
Running VQE with OVOS optimization for HF w. bond length 1.275 in basis 6-31G with 75% active virtual orbitals and orbital opt. = False...

Number of electrons: 10, Number of orbitals: 11
Initial MO coefficients are restricted (RHF-like).

OVOS optimized orbitals are unrestricted (UHF-like).

OVOS optimized energy = -103.657236 Hartree @ iterations 110.

Calculating UHF reference for comparison...
